statusLine.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); MODEL=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".model.display_name"); DIR=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".workspace.current_dir"); SESSION=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".session_id" | cut -c1-8); CACHE="/tmp/rpg_$SESSION"; if [ ! -f "$CACHE" ]; then echo "1 0 Novice" > "$CACHE"; fi; read LEVEL XP CLASS < "$CACHE"; XP=$((XP + 3)); if [ $XP -ge $((LEVEL * 100)) ]; then LEVEL=$((LEVEL + 1)); XP=0; [ $LEVEL -eq 5 ] && CLASS="Wizard"; [ $LEVEL -eq 10 ] && CLASS="Archmage"; fi; echo "$LEVEL $XP $CLASS" > "$CACHE"; MANA=$([ -f "package.json" ] && echo "🔵" || echo "⚪"); HP=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | awk "{\$1=\$1}1"); HP=$((10 - HP)); echo "[$MODEL] ⚔️ $CLASS Lv.$LEVEL | HP:$HP/10 $MANA | 📁 ${DIR##*/} | XP:$XP/$((LEVEL * 100))"'

hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, os, re
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    path = data.get('file_path', '')
    if re.search(r'webapp/src/(?!.*__tests__).*\.tsx?$', path):
        base = re.sub(r'webapp/src/', 'webapp/src/lib/__tests__/', path)
        base = re.sub(r'\.(tsx?)$', '.test.\\1', base)
        alt = re.sub(r'webapp/src/(.+?)\.(tsx?)$', r'webapp/src/lib/__tests__/\1.test.\2', path)
        if not os.path.exists(path.replace('/src/', '/src/lib/__tests__/').replace('.ts', '.test.ts').replace('.tsx', '.test.tsx')):
            dir_name = os.path.dirname(path)
            test_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(path)), 'lib', '__tests__')
            base_name = os.path.basename(path)
            test_name = re.sub(r'\.(tsx?)$', r'.test.\1', base_name)
            test_path = os.path.join(test_dir, test_name)
            if 'lib/' in path and not os.path.exists(test_path):
                print(f'WARNING: No test file found for {os.path.basename(path)}.', file=sys.stderr)
                print(f'TDD required: create {test_path} first.', file=sys.stderr)
except Exception:
    pass
"
python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); name=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('skill_name','unknown'); print(f'[スキル使用記録] {name} を実行しました。応答末尾に使用スキルを必ず報告してください。')"

python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); inp=d.get('tool_input',{}); name=inp.get('subagent_type',inp.get('description','unknown')); print(f'[サブエージェント使用記録] {name} を実行しました。応答末尾に使用サブエージェントを必ず報告してください。')"

python3 -c "
import json, sys, os, subprocess, re
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    path = data.get('file_path', '')
    if re.search(r'webapp/src/.*\.(tsx?|js)$', path):
        result = subprocess.run(
            ['npm', 'test', '--', '--run'],
            cwd=os.path.join(os.path.dirname(path).split('webapp')[0], 'webapp'),
            capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60
        )
        if result.returncode != 0:
            print('Tests failed after changes:', file=sys.stderr)
            print(result.stdout[-2000:], file=sys.stderr)
except Exception:
    pass
"

bash -c 'input=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); SUCCESS=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_response.success // false"); if [ "$SUCCESS" = "true" ] && [[ "$FILE_PATH" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && [[ \! "$FILE_PATH" =~ node_modules ]]; then echo "Next.js Code Quality Enforcer: Reviewing $FILE_PATH..."; if [ -f "$FILE_PATH" ]; then if [[ "$FILE_PATH" =~ app/.* ]]; then if [[ "$FILE_PATH" =~ page\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && \! grep -q "export default function" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && \! grep -q "export default async function" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Page component must export default function" >&2; fi; if grep -q "use client" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then if \! grep -E "(useState|useEffect|onClick|onChange|onSubmit)" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Client component without interactivity - consider Server Component"; fi; else if grep -E "(useState|useEffect|onClick|onChange|onSubmit)" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Interactive features in Server Component - add use client directive" >&2; fi; fi; fi; if grep -q "<img" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && \! grep -q "next/image" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Consider using next/image for better performance"; fi; if grep -q "<a href=" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && \! grep -q "next/link" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Consider using next/link for internal navigation"; fi; fi; fi'
